MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Kahtan Alansi is present.
Attorney Jameel Shihadeh appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jose Arrona is present.
Attorney Pauline Farmer-Koppenol representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
